name: Research Desk returns sources and synthesis from a query
description: User enters a research question, the system searches academic databases and web, and displays a synthesized answer with numbered citation sources.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Research Desk link in the sidebar
Type a research question of at least 10 characters in the search input field
Click the Research button to submit the query
Verify that after loading completes, a Research Analysis section appears with text content and a Sources section listing at least one source with a title and URL
